column1: # Tutorial Chapter 3, Lessons 10-11: multiple worksheets, GROUP
# formatting propagation, 3D copy destinations, and formulas that
# refer to a range spanning worksheets.
# Unsupported tutorial subflows intentionally not covered here:
# perspective view and multi-range/3D print ranges.
# Seed a tiny template on sheet A before creating the other worksheets.
# Add worksheets B and C after A.
# Copy the template from sheet A into both sheets B and C with a 3D
# Enter store values on sheets B and C.
# Back to A:B5, enter a 3D @SUM across B:B5..C:B5.
# GROUP mode propagates a range format from A to every sheet.
# Disable GROUP before leaving the transcript.
